Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class CollaborationGroup

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.CollaborationGroup
public class CollaborationGroup extends SObject

Java class for CollaborationGroup complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CollaborationGroup">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Announcement" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Announcement" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AnnouncementId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BannerPhotoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CanHaveGuests" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChatterGroup" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CollaborationGroupRecords" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CollaborationType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FeedSubscriptionsForEntity" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Feeds" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullPhotoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GroupEmail" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GroupMemberRequests" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GroupMembers" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasPrivateFieldsAccess" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InformationBody" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InformationTitle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsArchived" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAutoArchiveDisabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsBroadcast" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastFeedModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MediumPhotoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MemberCount" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActionHistories" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordActions" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SmallPhotoUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
